blended.narrative: Stevens Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 22 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,077 ft. Looking ahead, 53 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tomorrow: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 18" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 8.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 9" over the past week. Current depth: 44".
